transferableStrengths.strength: Enterprise AI adoption, governance, automation, analytics, and license-value enablement
Production troubleshooting, operational handoff, issue resolution, and vendor coordination

truthfulCapabilityGaps.requirement: 7+ years technology sales or account management experience
truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: Evidence shows project execution and a sales specialist title but not 7+ years of quota-carrying sales or account management.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: Client-facing technical project coordination and vendor alignment

truthfulCapabilityGaps.requirement: Leading large cloud engagements for enterprise customers
truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: No evidence of leading Azure, infrastructure migration, application modernization, or large global cloud engagements.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: Technical implementation coordination and deployment participation

truthfulCapabilityGaps.requirement: Executive relationship building and customer buy-in
truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: Stakeholder coordination is supported, but executive relationship ownership and commercial buy-in are not.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: Produced adoption and licensing evidence for managers, leaders, Finance, Microsoft, and regional stakeholders

truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: Vendor coordination is not equivalent to partner co-selling or ISV opportunity ownership.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: Vendor coordination and Microsoft-related program collaboration

truthfulCapabilityGaps.requirement: Business cases, proposals, negotiation, and deal closure
truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: Source supports coordination around bidding and negotiation but not proposal ownership, revenue, contract closure, or competitive displacement.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: Supported client requirements, bidding, negotiation coordination, and delivery documentation

truthfulCapabilityGaps.requirement: Pipeline management, forecasting, and quota attainment
truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: No evidence of sales pipeline, forecast, quota, or cloud-consumption ownership.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: Keep this as a gap or transferable angle; do not claim direct ownership.

truthfulCapabilityGaps.requirement: Azure, IaaS, PaaS, migration, and modernization knowledge
truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: Evidence does not establish Azure platform, IaaS/PaaS, cloud economics, migration, or modernization depth.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: Azure Data Explorer, Microsoft ecosystem, API integration, and deployment-support exposure

truthfulCapabilityGaps.requirement: Quota-carrying enterprise technology sales and Azure consumption ownership
truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: Do not claim it; pursue cloud adoption, technical account, solution enablement, or partner technical specialist roles where delivery evidence is relevant.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: Do not claim it; pursue cloud adoption, technical account, solution enablement, or partner technical specialist roles where delivery evidence is relevant.

truthfulCapabilityGaps.requirement: Large Azure cloud migration and application modernization engagements
truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: Add only verified migration or modernization project evidence; otherwise position related Workday, Intune, API, and enterprise automation work as implementation support.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: Add only verified migration or modernization project evidence; otherwise position related Workday, Intune, API, and enterprise automation work as implementation support.

truthfulCapabilityGaps.requirement: Executive selling, negotiation, proposal ownership, and deal closure
truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: Use client-facing technical coordination evidence conservatively and prepare concrete examples of stakeholder influence, requirements discovery, and vendor negotiation.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: Use client-facing technical coordination evidence conservatively and prepare concrete examples of stakeholder influence, requirements discovery, and vendor negotiation.

truthfulCapabilityGaps.requirement: Pipeline management, forecasting, and quota performance
truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: Do not include sales metrics without source evidence; treat this JD as a stretch or avoid application.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: Do not include sales metrics without source evidence; treat this JD as a stretch or avoid application.

truthfulCapabilityGaps.reason: Surface Azure Data Explorer and Microsoft ecosystem exposure only as supporting knowledge; obtain verified Azure training or project evidence if pursuing cloud roles.
truthfulCapabilityGaps.mitigation: Surface Azure Data Explorer and Microsoft ecosystem exposure only as supporting knowledge; obtain verified Azure training or project evidence if pursuing cloud roles.

recommendedPositioning.headline: Business-to-Technology Translator | Microsoft 365 Copilot Adoption, Power Platform Automation & Enterprise AI Enablement
recommendedPositioning.summaryAngle: This is an enterprise Azure sales role, and the candidate does not meet its core commercial screening thresholds. The safest truthful angle is Microsoft ecosystem adoption and solution enablement across Copilot, Power Platform, AI governance, analytics, and operational deployment support, but the application should be treated as Avoid unless additional verified enterprise sales evidence exists.
wordingGuidance: Do not position as a qualified Azure Solution Specialist. If applying, present as a business-to-technology translator with Microsoft ecosystem adoption and solution enablement experience seeking a customer-facing cloud adoption or solution specialist bridge role.
Generate a truthful transferable-positioning CV; do not pretend direct fit.
Strengthen wording only when supported by selected evidence.
Preserve unsupported requirements as gaps or risks, not visible strengths.

remainingHiringRisks.risk: 7+ years technology sales or account management experience
remainingHiringRisks.impactOnInterviewProbability: Materially reduces interview probability unless new evidence is added or the target angle changes.
remainingHiringRisks.mitigation: Evidence shows project execution and a sales specialist title but not 7+ years of quota-carrying sales or account management.
